## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between ZeroEntropy and GrowthX to explore potential partnership for content creation and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ZeroEntropy seeks high-quality, technical content creation at scale with minimal review time](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content partnership with AI workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Pricing: $20K for 8-week strategy sprint, then $12K-$15K/month for growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [Next steps: Compare GrowthX capabilities with Profound.ai (ZeroEntropy's current tool)](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)

## Topics

### ZeroEntropy's Current Content Strategy

  - [Creating 5-10 programmatic SEO articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [One flagship, technical post every \~3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Using contractor and Profound.ai for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Challenges: time-consuming reviews, maintaining technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end content partner for SEO and GEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [AI workflows combined with human expertise (e.g., former TechCrunch editor)](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Focus on well-researched, comprehensive, up-to-date content](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Clients include technical companies like Normal Security, SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### GrowthX Process

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20K) to create artifacts and start content production](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [Ongoing growth execution ($12K-$15K/month) for daily publishing](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop at every stage (strategy, editing, client communication)](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

### Comparative Analysis

  - [ZeroEntropy to provide inputs used with Profound.ai](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [GrowthX to demonstrate potential output for direct comparison](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Evaluate quality difference with/without extensive context artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ghita to record Loom video or email inputs used with Profound.ai](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Tyler to share specific traffic/impact statistics from GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [Tyler to prepare sample content relevant to ZeroEntropy](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to review comparisons and discuss potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/8fn66FQKWW3ZiiAygX6XbEGWztvoJ6hE?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
